{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Othaghor’s amphibian behemoth
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Othaghor’s amphibian behemoth]] has a sac on its neck that can swallow humans.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
